name: axis-skills
description: Axis pattern skills that DERIVE from the canonical rule base in ../rules — each skill is a map that routes the AI to the specific rule; none restate the invariants.

plugins.name: axis-dotnet
plugins.description: C#/.NET backend engineering the Axis way (Hexagonal + DDD + CQRS + Vertical Slices + AxisResult). Each skill maps to the corresponding package's canonical rules in rules/framework. Start from the axis-dotnet-architect hub.
